service.description: Split a BOM CSV into importable rows and rows that create reciprocal (cyclic) product relationships.

parameter.name: bomFile
parameter.description: Uploaded BOM CSV file; required when bomLocation is not provided

parameter.name: bomLocation
parameter.description: Alternate BOM file location (component://, runtime://, or absolute path) used when bomFile is not provided

parameter.name: hasHeader
parameter.description: Whether the CSV contains a header row

parameter.name: parentFieldName
parameter.description: Column name containing the parent/assembly SKU

parameter.name: componentFieldName
parameter.description: Column name containing the component SKU

parameter.name: parentColumnIndex
parameter.description: Fallback 1-based column index for parent when header is missing

parameter.name: componentColumnIndex
parameter.description: Fallback 1-based column index for component when header is missing

parameter.name: assocTypeFieldName
parameter.description: Column name for association type (used only when assocTypeFilter is provided)

parameter.name: assocTypeFilter
parameter.description: Optional association type to include; other rows are skipped

parameter.name: tempLocation
parameter.description: Base temp directory for uploaded files

parameter.name: outputLocation
parameter.description: Output directory for generated CSVs; defaults to {tempLocation}/output
